mapper.sql: id, student_tag, followup_interval_days, status, remark, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into student_followup_tag (student_tag, followup_interval_days, status, remark, created_at, updated_at) values (#{studentTag}, #{followupIntervalDays}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update student_followup_tag set student_tag = #{studentTag}, followup_interval_days = #{followupIntervalDays}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select from student_followup_tag where student_tag = #{studentTag} limit 1
